implBasis: Self-built (no shadcn/Radix); lucide Star icon, role=slider/img switch by interactivity

falseClaims.真實code行為: Rating 無 cva、無任何 `active:` 樣式；ColorMatrix story 明列 states=filled/empty/half/hover/focus/disabled，無 active。與 RadioGroup/SegmentedControl 已把 'active' 標記為 stale 並移除的同類問題一致（radioItemVariants/itemVariants cva 無 active-state 樣式），Rating meta 漏改。
